zpMemory watchdog: periodically read the memory usage of the main test process
and print it out, until terminated.
SC_PAGESIZE
SC_PAGE_SIZEi
z$ ... process data size: {data:.1f}G
data
__doc__
time
sysconfZ	page_size
ValueError
AttributeError
stdin
seek
